Who we are

Made in Delhi.
Built to last.

Ovella Homeware is a Delhi-based manufacturer with our production unit at Sector 5, Bawana Industrial Area. We produce every product in-house — from kitchen containers and insulated bottles to storage racks, cleaning tools, and more.

Because we own the full chain from raw material to finished product, we pass real savings directly to our customers. No inflated retail markups — just factory-direct value with superior quality packaging, available in big bundles for maximum savings.

Every part of our product — body, lid, and seal — is made from virgin US-grade polypropylene (PP), certified food-safe and completely BPA-free with zero chemical pigments, ensuring what touches your food is safe for your family.
